ABOVE_THE_LAW.title: Above The Law
ABOVE_THE_LAW.description: Transform a Strike and a Defend into any single card of your color. If you are offered this card from a card reward, you are forced to take it.
BLAHAJ_ENJOYER.title: Blahaj Enjoyer
BLAHAJ_ENJOYER.description: The Merchant now transforms cards instead of removing them.
CURSE_OF_GREED_MODIFIER.title: Curse of Greed
CURSE_OF_GREED_MODIFIER.description: Every card you find is [gold]Upgraded[/gold]. Cards have a [blue]50%[/blue] chance to be [gold]discarded[/gold] instead of played. Cannot trigger more than once per turn.
DIG.title: DIG!
FIFTY_FIFTY.description: At the start of combat, exhaust half of your draw pile.
FOUR_FOR_FOUR_MODIFIER.title: 4 For 4
FOUR_FOR_FOUR_MODIFIER.description: Gain [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]energy[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] less card each turn.
GADGETS_MODIFIER.title: Gadget
GADGETS_MODIFIER.description: Start with a powerful relic. You can change what it does by removing cards...no wait...must, you must change what it does by removing cards.
HEIRLOOM.title: Heirloom
MY_TRUE_FORM.title: My True Form
MY_TRUE_FORM.description: Start with [gold]Demon Form[/gold], [gold]Serpent Form[/gold], [gold]Void Form[/gold], [gold]Reaper Form[/gold], and [gold]Echo Form[/gold].
MY_UNCLE_OWNS_MEGACRIT.title: My Uncle Owns Megacrit
ONE_OF_EVERYTHING.title: One of Almost Everything
ONE_OF_EVERYTHING.description: Start with one of every non innate card. [red]Warning, do not combine with Peak Gaming or Hoarder.[/red]
PEAK_GAMING.title: Peak Gaming
PEAK_GAMING.description: Duplicate your starting deck. Start with [gold]Bing Bong[/gold].
PERFECT_LETHAL.title: Perfect Lethal
PERFECT_LETHAL.description: Overkill damage is reflected back to the attacker.
PRAISE_SNECKO.title: Praise Snecko
STICKY_STARTERS_MODIFIER.title: Sticky Starters
TEXAS_HOLDEM.title: Texas Hold'em
THE_I_LOVE_VAKUU_MODIFIER.title: I Love Vakuu
THE_I_GOT_A_ROCK_MODIFIER.title: I got a rock...
THE_I_GOT_A_ROCK_MODIFIER.description: All potions are rocks, start with [gold]Petrified Toad[/gold].
THE_LAW.title: The Law
THE_LAW.description: Transform a Strike and a Defend into any single common card of your color. If you are offered this card from a card reward, you are forced to take it.
